default_timeout.description: Timeout in seconds for each probe request.

page_provider_id.description: Provider ID used by the web panel. Leave empty to use the current/default provider when AstrBot exposes one.

enable_token_probe.description: Enable token-accounting probes by default. Full audits always enable token probes even when this is false.

enable_fingerprint_probe.description: Enable LLM fingerprint probes by default. Full audits always enable fingerprint probes even when this is false.

fingerprint_profile.description: Fingerprint probe breadth: light, standard, or exhaustive.

fingerprint_repeats.description: Repeat count for each fingerprint probe. Higher values improve mixed-route detection but cost more requests.

enable_auxiliary_llm_judge.description: Reserved for optional auxiliary-LLM judging. Deterministic scoring remains authoritative.

auxiliary_judge_provider_id.description: Optional AstrBot provider ID used as the auxiliary LLM judge for deep fingerprint matching. Leave empty to use the page/current provider when available.

enable_context_probe.description: Reserved for future context-window sentinel probes. Currently disabled.

strict_mode.description: Apply a more conservative confidence penalty for failed probes.
